data.content:
This is an **NUnit** project on **VSTest**. Use the `--filter` option with a `FullyQualifiedName` filter:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests"
```

This matches any test whose fully qualified name contains `ReportExporterTests`, which will run only the two tests in that class.
